title: cola nitida
intro: Cola nitida, also known as the bitter cola, is a tropical plant native to Africa, belonging to the Sterculiaceae family. The bark and roots of the cola nitida plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of cola nitida have been used to alleviate fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, while also serving as a natural remedy for digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the bark and roots of cola nitida are often dried and ground into powder or made into tea to harness its medicinal benefits.
